item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
way to be a neutral commentator
as is tradition
radio shack had em (jk)
teeth in the stomach.. brilliant
bc building dams is awesome?
slaps fairly hard
mmm hmm
would love to meet some fellow dumpers. i steal so much from them i feel like i know them
kinda need to see Silence of the Lambs for this one
i guess
please don't get your pets high gang
yes
not 'ha ha' funny
wondering who the bird man that children should see is
what's your favorite dinosaur, gang?
love me a good courtesy phone
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: Cyberball2073

item.title: Our Pantry Makeover: See the Before and after
item.description:
Finished
Before
Made a mock up in Fusion 360, exported to iPhone and used the native AR file viewer to place the model into the pantry to see what it could look like
The old out
Concrete was very uneven. We wanted all walls to look similar with mudding
First mudding done
Splitting wood to make supports for the shelves
Supports are up
The shelving could not fit i to the room as one piece. So I decided to split then up. Made a quick jig to draw out a path which I just cut with a jigsaw
Placing the first shelves
Glued and shot a nail. Used the clamp to avid the wood splitting. Added acrylic and mud after the glue was dry.
Time to add acrylic all around and paint
First coat with paint gun. Sanding needed and applied a second coat
Added Philips Hue light strips around the door, and set up a motion sensor to trigger it and the ceiling light
Testing motion sensor
It's fun to compare this video to the first simulation I did. Surprised over the similarities
item.dc:creator: DIYguy

Ok space lady I love you bye bye!

item.title: Stupidity has been weaponized and i can't think of way to battle against it
item.dc:creator: SnarfyMcSnarferson

item.title: Nobody else to say this to
item.description: I've known her for 35 years. We've been friends, a couple, a married couple, a divorced couple, FWB. She lived with me while fighting breast cancer. We have four kids and have remained very close during the 17+ years after our divorce. My kids are all in their 20s, but I worry for how this is impacting and will impact them. But I'm handling it badly. When I or my ex have had major issues we always end up talking to each other about them. She's been my sanity check and my reality anchor during some tough times. I love her as much as when I first met her, even if we didn't work as a couple. I'm sitting out of state trying to wrap my head around this. Her doctor told her 40% to survive 2 months and then moved it to 15% to survive a month. They are encouraging her to enter hospice - though she has rejected that for now because she doesn't want our kids to see her NOT fight as much as she can. The treatment she needs is a bone marrow transplant, but due to her other health issues it's not possible. So she's on a million pills trying to hold on as long as possible. I'm sad, but trying to save it for when the bad happens. But I'm coping poorly. There's nobody in my life I have to really talk to, so there is my little bit of screaming into the void. Fuck.
item.dc:creator: ixyylt

item.title: I painted Le Montreur de Arras in my style!
item.description: The client asked me to paint a copy of the painting Le Montreur de Arras but with my style, so I did and both me as well as the client are very happy with the result! If you'd like to commission an oil painting or a drawing from me as well, contact me via my official website: anisjerbi.com Thank you all so much!!!!
item.dc:creator: AnisJerbi

item.title: Missing in Denver
item.description: EDIT: ALLIE HAS BEEN FOUND AND IS SAFELY BACK AT HOME. THANK YOU <3 I never post this kinda thing here. If anyone is in the Denver area please keep an eye out. She was sleeping over a friends last night and went on a walk to make a phone call. She was last seen on stout and 26th 3 minutes from Cervantes. I talked to her last at 9 pm on the phone and she said she was on her way back. Her phone has been dead since. She was wearing a black fur coat, black pants and docs. Red hair in a high bun with a headband.
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting
